fieldValues.value:
Document projection — assembling multiple Records from a Container into a coherent, ordered document. Depends on `ext:views-l1`.

See section `ext:views-l2` for type definitions (`SectionSource`, `DocumentSection`, `DocumentView`, `ThemeReference`, `ThemeVariant`), the default rendering baseline, the L1/L2 ExportConfig boundary rule, heading hierarchy, and conformance rules [N]–[N+8].

sourceRefs.note: Extension ext:views-l2 from srs-spec.md - coarse source anchoring during migration
